title: Plants Can Grow in Trees!
description: This simple Datapack makes ferns, flowers etc. placeable on logs. Allowing for a little more creativity when building!
body:
This simple Datapack allows for more creativity when building wooded or overgrown environments, **by making it possible to place ferns, grass & saplings etc. on logs.** i had the idea for this Datapack after hearing about temperate rainforests and of course i wanted to recreate one in Minecraft!
![A variety of plants; ferns, saplings, bamboo, flowers, etc. placed on logs and stems.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4fe829f6f9f661ffbbe46bc8851edc1ea26084c.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/B0JXFskaA8o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This Datapack works by adding #minecraft:logs to a bunch of block tags that define which blocks various plants can be placed on.

If the Datapack is uninstalled, any plants placed on logs will remain until given a block update.
